query: SELECT id, sport, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, gameNumber, market, pickSide, odds, line, result, awayScore, homeScore, anGameId, timeframe, createdAt FROM tracked_bets WHERE gameDate='2026-05-01' ORDER BY id;
